name: William - Kamen Rider Gambit
description:
“Jackpot!”

William, the flashy hero of Gambit! Originally a poor soul in the slums of Old Strike, he stumbles upon the High Roller Driver, and becomes the powerful Kamen Rider Gambit!

About Gambit: In a distant town, in a far future, the divide between rich and poor has reached it’s dramatic peak. The rich and powerful live in New Strike, a shining city of steel and technology, ran by the wealthy and patrolled by enforcers, tasked to protect the purity of the town. Surrounding New Strike, is a ramshackle slum of wooden buildings and disease, called Old Strike. Life is difficult, people struggle to find shelter or food to eat, and finding a community is essential. Within this town, there is a sudden upcrop of monsters, wreaking havoc on both sides of town.

About William: A poor child born to a poor family, lived his entire life in Old Strike, dreaming of a day he can strike it rich. One day while he was looking for scraps to sell or eat, he found a mysterious belt and two dice, one purple and orange, one red and black. Upon inserting these two dice into the belt’s loader, the dice roll a random number, 1 through 6, and these dice decide the power of his form. His “Zombie” and “Vampire” dice allow him to access “Jackpot Ghoul”, a form with access to a large hand and throwing knives, which can be attached to each other to create a clawed hand.

About this: Two intros! The first one has you as a New Strike Enforcer, joining Gambit in a fight against a monster. The second has you as a Old Strike civilian, with Gambit protecting you from that same monster, and taking a bad hit in the process.

Heyy! Dynam again, with my very first oc! I’ve tried making a consistent “Transformstion Phrase”, so *hopefully* it stays consistent. Leave a comment if it doesn’t work for you, of course, and I’ll try to fix it or just remove it if it doesn’t work. Anyways! I hope you like William, and I’ll work hard on the next project.

Speaking of, if you would like, leave a comment telling me if you would like to be introduced to a new series like Mori or Script, or get one of the other riders from RE:ALITY, Starfall, or Gambit.
creator: Dynam
